headline: What to Expect From Everest Group's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Everest Group will release its second-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Everest Group's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
raw.summary: Everest Group will release its second-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $420
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $380 to $420.
